title: Karpathy Bigram explained in 10min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code presents a 10-minute explanation of Andrej Karpathy's Bigram Language Model, covering tokenization, embeddings, and training fundamentals. The video serves as a foundation for understanding larger models like GPT, incorporating key concepts such as cross-entropy loss, softmax, and the AdamW optimizer.
writeup: This tutorial walks through Andrej Karpathy's bigram language model implementation, covering tokenization, embedding, loss functions, and optimization. It functions as a foundational introduction to language model mechanics, positioned before attention and GPT architectures. Concrete topics include logits, softmax, backpropagation, and the AdamW optimizer.
